CustomField.formula: IF(LEN($User.Mailbox_Contact_ID__c) =0 && LEFT($User.HouseholdID__c,15) = LEFT(Reply_To_Contact__r.Household_Account__c ,15), TRUE, IF(LEN($User.Mailbox_Contact_ID__c) > 0 && LEFT($User.Mailbox_Contact_ID__c,15) = LEFT(Reply_To_Contact__r.Id ,15), TRUE, FALSE))
CustomField.label: My Replies
